verdict.label: Marginal
verdict.headline: Lagide Lunch
verdict.reason: There is a possible lunch window at Lagide, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Lagide looks like a fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 112 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 77/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · 0.6-1.1 m · 112 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear.

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 91 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 79/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Expect: it can feel softer or less defined than the main peaks, and rocks may appear closer to the west cliffs.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is a sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent · 0.6-1.1 m · 91 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear.

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a clean fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 122 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 78/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Expect: it is less reliable than the main bay spots, so weak swell or short period can make it feel soft.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is an inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay · 0.6-1.1 m · 122 kJ · 8 s period · good wind at 20 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Baleal looks like a small window: 0.3-0.6 m, 66 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 78/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A broad, forgiving beach setup with several peaks; this is best for spreading out and finding a manageable wave when the bay has enough push.  Watch: spot surf looks too small.
ranked.shortExplanation: Baleal is a broad, forgiving beach setup with several peaks · 0.3-0.6 m · 66 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear · Watch: spot surf looks too small.
